summary: Iteration 84 - Dashboard Charts Testing Complete. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 interactive charts render correctly with real seed data. REDD Evolution Chart shows dual-axis CO₂ area + Score REDD+ line. SSRTE Trends Chart shows stacked risk bars + enfants line. Risk by Zone Chart shows horizontal bars with color-coded risk for 10 zones. Practices Donut Chart shows 71% average with 4 practice labels. All previous KPIs (REDD+ widget, SSRTE widget, Subscription banner) still render correctly.

issues: Console warning: recharts width/height -1 on initial render (cosmetic, charts render correctly after)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 84 verified 4 interactive recharts charts on cooperative dashboard. Charts API returns real data with activity in Feb-Mar 2026. All data-testid attributes work correctly. Recent Members uses data-testid='recent-member-{index}' pattern. Minor console warning about recharts width/height on initial render is cosmetic and doesn't affect functionality.
